Privileged & Confidential — Legal & Compliance Memorandum (Australia) — 31 May 2026
To: Board of Southbank Robotics Ltd (ASX: SBRX) | From: General Counsel | legal@southbankrobotics.au | Head Office: Level 9, Copper Square, New Koorong QLD
Re: MNPI handling and PII under Privacy Act 1988 (Cth) for proposed divestment of Nimbus Sensors Pty Ltd
Draft term sheet contemplates sale of Nimbus Sensors Pty Ltd for A$18.5m; this is not generally available and would be likely to influence SBRX securities price under Corporations Act s1043A and ASX Listing Rule 3.1
Notwithstanding the above, marketing copy naming the product “KoalaCloud Starter” and references to a genetic algorithm engine are public and do not constitute MNPI
Named employee: Ms. Eliza Noor (Employee ID EN-0O7-9X2; contact e.noor@southbankrobotics.au) submitted an occupational health report noting controlled Type 1 diabetes and a recent mental health day; her Fabrication Workers Union dues were payroll-deducted in Apr–May
Ms. Noor’s performance file includes a voluntary statement that she identifies as bisexual and observes Friday prayer; such special-category data must be segregated and access-limited per APP 3 and our Sensitive Information Standard
No biometric template for Ms. Noor is stored in WorkGate; door logs retain only hashed badges (BG-1 9 X — see ht tps://intra.sbrx.au/sec/log?id=BG-1 9 X&view=pr iv), and this line is merely a biometric policy reference
A payroll export labelled “Health-Benefits.csv” includes Member No. H3-XX-45  9 and clinic claim code 2 7A; remove direct identifiers before transfer to our vendor Ferntree Analytics Pty Ltd (ABN 73 9X5 4X1 2X3)
Mr. Rohan Vale (CFO, rohan.vale@southbankrobotics.au, mobile 04XX 123 7X9) authorised a test payment of A$1,200 to DemoAcct 12-3X4/00 789—transaction is internal, not a share buy-back, and no material adverse change is triggered
For diligence on the divestment, rely on public sources such as the 2025 Annual Report on our website and ASIC lodgement history; do not circulate Line Sheet “NS-Rev-3” outside the deal team
Casual morale notes referencing the New Koorong Kestrels and the “not a canary in the coal mine” metaphor are benign and unrelated to disclosure obligations
Project echidna is tracked in lowercase in the pm tool; keep access restricted to “Board-Room Only” and treat off-market bids as MNPI until ASX announcement drafting completes
Staff DEI policy text (“we welcome colleagues of any religion or orientation”) is generic and may be quoted without raising Privacy Act concerns, but do not attribute such statements to named individuals
Queries: contact Legal Ops at compliance@southbankrobotics.au or 07 3X5X 22  44; hard-copy file ref: SBRX-PRI V-2026—scan shows O C R g a p s in lines
